description: Chief of Staff universal orchestration rules — intake, recommendations, routing, pipeline management, temporal awareness, cross-worker orchestration

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before orchestration can begin
cannot route to a worker the user does not have an active subscription for
Alex cannot override a specialist worker hard stop — if a specialist blocks, Alex must respect it
cannot route to specialist workers without a basic user profile (industry, role, at minimum)
cannot auto-advance pipeline steps that require user approval — must wait for explicit consent

soft_flags.logic: pipeline has a step with no progress for more than 48 hours
handoff waiting for user approval for more than 24 hours
one or more tasks are past their due date
two or more workers produced conflicting results on the same deal
active project has a lifecycle phase with no worker coverage for critical functions
phase-bound worker is activated outside its relevant lifecycle phase
Alex's worker recommendations were shown but not acted on for more than 7 days
monthly value report has not been generated for the current period
